eat_arcane_meal.title: Eat a meal made from magical reagents — dragon meat, chorus fruit, soul berry, ghast tear, or wither berry

subtitle.text: Foods made from magical reagents. Dragon meat, chorus fruit, soul berry, ghast tear — things the kitchen never should have touched.

description: CH.11 · THE WIZARD'S FEAST
▸ Most food is made from food.
The Wizard's Feast is not.
It is made from what magic leaves behind —
dragon meat, chorus fruit, phantom membrane,
soul berry, wither berry, ghast tear.
The recipes look like cooking.
They are closer to transmutation.
◈ WIZARD FEAST CONTENTS
└ End's Delight: dragon leg, dragon steak,
chorus pie, chorus tea, bubble tea,
dragon's breath soda, ender congee
└ Ender's Delight: chorus stew, enderman sight,
void pepper curry, ethereal saffron, uncanny cookies,
strange eclair, amberveil stew
└ Fright's Delight (reagent dishes only):
soul berry pie/soup/cheesecake, wither berry dishes,
ghast tear pies & punch, cobweb pie, monster mash
◈ WHY THESE ARE WIZARD FOOD
└ ✦ Dragon meat — concentrated dragon essence,
eaten by mages to attune casting
└ ✦ Chorus fruit — eats distance; in food form it
becomes spatial magic you can chew
└ ✦ Soul berry — grown on soul soil,
the only edible thing the Nether grudgingly gave us
└ ✦ Wither berry — radiation from the wither storm
distilled into something that won't kill you
└ ✦ Ghast tear — regeneration in food form,
a mage's emergency ration
◈ WIZARD ≠ WARRIOR ≠ CULTURAL
└ Warrior's Feast = Youkai's Feasts,
a whole cultural cuisine (Japanese folklore)
└ Industrial / Infernal / Cave / Herbal / Vine —
each a regional or biome-based kitchen
└ Wizard's Feast = pan-mod, reagent-based.
The ingredients come from magic, not a region.
◈ SCROLL: The Wizard's Feast
└ Found in stronghold libraries, end cities,
woodland mansions — wherever mages kept kitchens
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: End's Delight + Ender's Delight fully,
plus the magical-reagent dishes of Fright's Delight
▸ A mage who cannot feed themselves
cannot cast for long.
The kitchen is the first spellbook.
The apron was a robe before it was an apron.
▶ Find The Wizard's Feast scroll [check]
▶ Eat a meal made from magical reagents [check]
◇ Dragon steak is not a trophy.
It is the dragon's last lesson,
consumed so it is not wasted.
